title: jQuery methods not supported in WeWeb
symptom: The confetti effect code using jQuery does not execute in WeWeb, while it works in Webflow.
applies_when: Using jQuery methods in custom code
Trying to trigger events on button clicks
root_cause: WeWeb does not support jQuery, which means any code relying on jQuery methods will fail to execute. Instead, WeWeb provides its own way to handle events and custom scripts.
fix_steps: Remove jQuery code from the custom script
Use WeWeb's workflow feature to handle button clicks
Add a custom JavaScript block to execute the confetti logic directly
agent_instruction: Replace jQuery code with WeWeb's workflow and custom JS block for confetti effect.
